title: Misuse of genvar not caught cleanly.
body:
The following code is not valid SystemVerilog (I would think), but the bug is not caught by compilation.

```
module top();
genvar g;
logic sig;
assign sig = | g;
endmodule
```

Instead:
```
Verilator 5.019 devel rev v5.018-97-g8e1c0b085
verilator --cc -j 3 +librescan +libext+.sv --top-module makerchip -Wno-fatal -y . -y /src/verilog -y /src/proj_default -y /src/proj_verilog -y /src/sandhost -y /src/lib +incdir+. +incdir+./sv_url_inc +incdir+/src/verilog +incdir+/src/proj_default +incdir+/src/proj_verilog +incdir+/src/sandhost +incdir+/src/lib makerchip.sv --timing --trace-max-array 64 --assert --trace
Using pre-built verilated*.o object files.
g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-overloaded-virtual -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable       -DVL_DEBUG=1 -c -o sim_main.o sim_main.cpp
/usr/bin/python3 /usr/local/share/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vmakerchip.cpp Vmakerchip___024root__DepSet_heb589fd1__0.cpp Vmakerchip___024root__DepSet_h19d90021__0.cpp Vmakerchip__Trace__0.cpp Vmakerchip___024root__Slow.cpp Vmakerchip___024root__DepSet_h19d90021__0__Slow.cpp Vmakerchip__Syms.cpp Vmakerchip__Trace__0__Slow.cpp Vmakerchip__TraceDecls__0__Slow.cpp > Vmakerchip__ALL.cpp
echo "" > Vmakerchip__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
g++ -Os  -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=1 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=1 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-overloaded-virtual -Wno-shadow -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-parameter -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable       -DVL_DEBUG=1 -c -o Vmakerchip__ALL.o Vmakerchip__ALL.cpp
In file included from Vmakerchip__ALL.cpp:8:
Vmakerchip___024root__DepSet_h19d90021__0__Slow.cpp: In function 'void Vmakerchip___024root___ctor_var_reset(Vmakerchip___024root*)':
Vmakerchip___024root__DepSet_h19d90021__0__Slow.cpp:75:13: error: 'class Vmakerchip___024root' has no member named 'makerchip__DOT__top__DOT__g'; did you mean 'makerchip__DOT__cyc_cnt'?
   75 |     vlSelf->makerchip__DOT__top__DOT__g = VL_RAND_RESET_I(32);
      |             ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      |             makerchip__DOT__cyc_cnt
In file included from Vmakerchip__ALL.cpp:10:
Vmakerchip__Trace__0__Slow.cpp: In function 'void Vmakerchip___024root__trace_const_0_sub_0(Vmakerchip___024root*, VerilatedTrace::Buffer*)':
Vmakerchip__Trace__0__Slow.cpp:73:42: error: 'class Vmakerchip___024root' has no member named 'makerchip__DOT__top__DOT__g'; did you mean 'makerchip__DOT__cyc_cnt'?
   73 |     bufp->fullBit(oldp+7,((0U != vlSelf->makerchip__DOT__top__DOT__g)));
      |                                          ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      |                                          makerchip__DOT__cyc_cnt
make: *** [/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.mk:269: Vmakerchip__ALL.o] Error 1
rm Vmakerchip__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
```

The above is a LOG from running exactly the given code in the Makerchip(.com) IDE. It contains the Verilator version and command lines. Makerchip is currently running Ubuntu 23.10.
code_blocks:

logic sig;
